backend/main.mo: Main Motoko actor implementing the backend for a spiritual e-commerce app, including access-controlled CRUD for products, tarot services, orders, appointments, wishlists, user profiles, newsletter signups, and loyalty points.
feature_evidence.json: Feature evidence report confirming that a '100/100 stars' website rating display was added to the Header component, with high confidence and a reference to the relevant file and test ID.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: A JSON-formatted text file containing one-to-two sentence summaries of each frontend source file, serving as a reference document for the project's frontend structure and component responsibilities.
frontend/index.css: Global CSS entry point that imports Tailwind layers and defines OKLCH-based CSS custom properties for light and dark themes, including colors for background, foreground, primary, sidebar, and chart elements.
frontend/index.html: HTML entry point for the Vite/React app with SEO meta tags describing the 'Mystic Moon with Ishita' spiritual services brand and a root div for React mounting.
frontend/src/App.tsx: Root React component that composes all page sections (Header, Hero, CrystalOfTheDay, CrystalQuiz, About, Services, Reviews, ProductCatalog, Appointment, Footer, etc.), manages wishlist/newsletter modal state, and handles scroll-to-appointment and book-now callbacks.
frontend/src/components/About.tsx: About section component displaying Ishita's circular portrait, a bio description, and three stat badges (Experience, Clients, Confidential) styled with the blue-crystal-moon palette.
frontend/src/components/Appointment.tsx: Multi-step appointment booking form (form → payment → confirmation) that collects user details, validates inputs, shows a UPI payment step, and submits the appointment via a React Query mutation hook.
Displays a deterministically selected daily crystal based on the current date, showing its intention, price (with optional Holi promo), and a button that scrolls to the product in the shop section.
frontend/src/components/CrystalQuiz.tsx: Interactive multi-step quiz (zodiac, mood, intention) that scores crystal products based on user answers and recommends the top-matching crystals, integrating loyalty points and Holi promo pricing.
Displays a 6-image grid gallery of customer unboxing photos with hover overlays and a fallback emoji, plus a link to the brand's Instagram page.
frontend/src/components/Footer.tsx: Site footer with brand info, Instagram link, lists of reading services and shop categories, and a CTA button that scrolls to the appointment section or triggers a callback.
frontend/src/components/Header.tsx: Sticky site header with a centered logo (with SVG fallback), a wishlist button showing item count, and a loyalty points badge. Includes the HoliBanner component above the main header bar.
frontend/src/components/Hero.tsx: Full-width hero section displaying the brand logo, tagline, heading, star rating, and CTA buttons to scroll to services or products, with animated decorative sparkle elements.
frontend/src/components/HoliBanner.tsx: Promotional banner that displays a Holi sale discount percentage and a live countdown timer to a hardcoded sale end date; renders nothing when HOLI_PROMO_ACTIVE is false.
frontend/src/components/ImportantNotes.t: Static section rendering four informational cards (delivery time, format, restrictions, confidentiality) in a responsive grid layout.
frontend/src/components/LoyaltyPointsBad: Small badge component that displays the user's current loyalty points and shows a tooltip with progress toward the next reward tier.
frontend/src/components/NewsletterSignup: Newsletter signup form that collects name and email, calls a signup mutation, and on success displays a discount code; supports both inline and modal display modes.
frontend/src/components/ProductCard.tsx: Card component for a single product showing its image (with emoji fallback), type/trending badges, Holi sale pricing, wishlist toggle with loyalty point awards, and expandable reviews section.
frontend/src/components/ProductCatalog.t: Renders the main product catalog section with filter tabs (all, crystals, bracelets, pendulums, yantra), a Holi promotional banner, and a grid of ProductCard components filtered by the active tab.
frontend/src/components/ProductReviews.t: Displays per-product reviews filtered from the global reviews dataset, showing an average star rating summary and a scrollable list of individual review cards.
Shows up to three related products of the same type as the current product, rendered as small clickable cards that smooth-scroll to the target product on the page.
frontend/src/components/Reviews.tsx: Renders a full-page testimonials section displaying all reviews from the reviews dataset in a responsive grid with star ratings, review text, author name, date, and category badge.
frontend/src/components/Services.tsx: Renders tarot and spiritual service categories as cards with a hand-pentacle SVG illustration, listing service names, prices, and individual 'Book This' buttons that open a booking flow.
Displays a gallery grid of service category images with hover overlays and labels, falling back to an SVG illustration when images fail to load, plus an Instagram follow button.
frontend/src/components/WishlistPanel.ts: A slide-in side panel showing the user's wishlisted products with Holi-discounted pricing, remove/clear controls, a total price summary, and an order button that opens Instagram.
frontend/src/data/products.ts: Defines the `LocalProduct` interface and exports a static array of product listings (crystals, bracelets, etc.) with metadata like price, image URL, and product type.
frontend/src/data/reviews.ts: Defines the `Review` interface and exports a static array of customer reviews for tarot sessions and crystal purchases, each with rating, date, and optional product ID.
frontend/src/data/serviceGalleryImages.t: Defines the `ServiceGalleryImage` interface and exports a static array mapping tarot service categories to their banner image paths and display labels.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: Custom hook that creates and caches an ICP backend actor (authenticated or anonymous) using React Query, and invalidates dependent queries whenever the actor changes.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: Provides an `InternetIdentityProvider` context and `useInternetIdentity` hook for managing ICP Internet Identity authentication, including login, logout, and identity persistence via `AuthClient`.
frontend/src/hooks/useLoyaltyPoints.ts: Custom hook that manages a localStorage-backed loyalty points system with reward tiers, and provides helpers to award points for purchases, wishlist additions, and quiz completions.
frontend/src/hooks/useQueries.ts: Exports React Query hooks for fetching and mutating products, tarot services, and appointments via the ICP backend actor, including queries by type/category and CRUD mutations.
frontend/src/hooks/useWishlist.ts: Custom hook that manages a localStorage-backed wishlist of product IDs, exposing add, remove, toggle, and clear operations along with an `isWishlisted` check.
frontend/src/index.css: Global CSS file that imports Google Fonts (Cinzel, Cormorant Garamond, Lato), sets up Tailwind directives, and defines a blue-crystal-moon design system with CSS custom properties for both light and dark themes, plus utility classes for gradients and effects.
frontend/src/main.tsx: React app entry point that wraps the App component with QueryClientProvider (React Query) and InternetIdentityProvider before mounting to the DOM.
frontend/src/utils/pricing.ts: Utility functions for pricing logic including adding a ₹400 markup to base prices, formatting prices in Indian Rupees, and calculating a 20% Holi promotional discount.
frontend/src/utils/urlParams.ts: Utility functions for extracting, persisting, and clearing URL parameters from both regular query strings and hash-based routing, with sessionStorage fallback support.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Tailwind CSS configuration extending the theme with brand-specific colors (crystal, moon, sparkle palettes), custom fonts, border radii, box shadows, gradients, and animations like float and sparkle.
project_state.json: Project state metadata for a Crystal & Tarot Shop e-commerce site, tracking existing features and a pending new feature request to display a '100 stars' website rating in the header alongside the wishlist button.
